subcodes.first_line: O thou who art gladdened by the glad-tidings of God! When a gentle breeze passeth over a frail form, it bestoweth gladness and delight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستبشر ببشارات الله نسیم لطیفى چون بر جسم ضعیفى مرور نماید نشاط وانبساط
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
